Event: Magic Well - May 2024
Event Date: 04/05/2024
Sage Bot Item Code: M3


Other locations the gear can be found
Magic Well Driller Chest
Right Target Mace

When attacking, has 25%-29% chance of stunning an enemy for 2,5 sec.
Once in a while, scares the target of the attack for 3 sec and deals 300000 physical damage to it. The mace wielder also has a 70% chance to scare all enemies in a small radius around the main target for 3 sec.
For each enemy scared with this ability, the mace wielder goes into a frenzy. They increase in size, and all their stats are increased by 10% for 3 sec. Stacks up to 5 times.

Requirements: 98-100
